list.title: Buses

empty.title: No buses found
empty.description: There are no buses available at the moment. Check back later.

list.notFoundDescription: There are no bus details at the moment. Check back later.

details.noActiveTripDescription: This bus is currently not assigned to any active trip.

delete.title: Are you absolutely sure?
delete.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the bus and all associated data.
